---
name: Launch checklist
about: Track a new coin launch
title: '[LAUNCH] $TICKER — Launch Checklist'
labels: launch
assignees: ''
---

## Pre-launch
- [ ] Devnet test complete
- [ ] SOL secured in deployer wallet
- [ ] Config file reviewed
- [ ] Health check passes 20/20
- [ ] Twitter API working

## Launch day
- [ ] Switch to mainnet
- [ ] Deploy token
- [ ] Confirm mint address on explorer
- [ ] Confirm LP locked
- [ ] Confirm mint authority revoked
- [ ] Run promoter
- [ ] Confirm post live on X

## Post-launch
- [ ] Monitor treasury wallet
- [ ] First buyback executed
- [ ] Transparency log published
